scripts.build:win:x64: npm run prepare:native-assets && node ../scripts/build-electron.js nsis x64
scripts.pack:win:x64: npm run prepare:native-assets && node ../scripts/build-electron.js dir x64
scripts.build:linux:x64: npm run prepare:native-assets && node ../scripts/build-electron.js linux AppImage x64
scripts.pack:linux:x64: npm run prepare:native-assets && node ../scripts/build-electron.js linux dir x64
scripts.build:linux:arm64: npm run prepare:native-assets && node ../scripts/build-electron.js linux AppImage arm64
scripts.pack:linux:arm64: npm run prepare:native-assets && node ../scripts/build-electron.js linux dir arm64
scripts.build:mac:x64: npm run prepare:native-assets && node ../scripts/build-electron.js mac dmg x64
scripts.pack:mac:x64: npm run prepare:native-assets && node ../scripts/build-electron.js mac dir x64
scripts.build:mac:arm64: npm run prepare:native-assets && node ../scripts/build-electron.js mac dmg arm64
scripts.pack:mac:arm64: npm run prepare:native-assets && node ../scripts/build-electron.js mac dir arm64
